title: Terms of Use
intro: These terms of use govern your access to and use of the MyHome24App platform. By using our website, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: 1. Use of the Platform
sections.text: You agree to use the platform only in accordance with applicable laws and not to publish abusive or fraudulent content.

sections.title: 2. User Accounts
sections.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and credentials. All activities under your account are your responsibility.

sections.title: 3. Content and Listings
sections.text: All published content must be accurate and lawful. MyHome24App reserves the right to remove content.

sections.title: 4. Liability
sections.text: We are not liable for damages arising from the use of the platform, to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: 5. Changes
sections.text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. The updated version will be published on this page.
